title: carpinus betulus
intro: Carpinus betulus, commonly known as European hornbeam, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the family Betulaceae. The bark of Carpinus betulus contains salicin, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable resource for its medicinal properties. Carpinus betulus is used to alleviate various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Carpinus betulus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to create natural remedies for various health concerns.
